gist.headline: Daily Chronicle
gist.blurb: The hive's daily records have been updated with the latest community creations and news.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to reflect the latest news and recently added community apps.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's front page fresh with the newest community contributions and updates.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a librarian or archivist, updating a large pixelated notice board with new polaroids of community apps.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny reading glasses, pinning new pixelated polaroid photos to a wooden notice board. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm cream gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny reading glasses, pinning new pixelated polaroid photos to a wooden notice board.
